runbooks.label: Morning Review
runbooks.description: Review the daily briefing, scheduled-job posture, unified stream, and current governor status before widening automation for the day.

runbooks.label: Pause or Resume Automation
runbooks.description: Pause a lane or resume it through the governor when you need to halt background automation without touching SSH or Docker directly.

runbooks.label: Provider Exhaustion Recovery
runbooks.description: Inspect quota pressure, reserve posture, and provider fallback state; then prefer local execution or handoff-only modes when premium lanes are constrained.

runbooks.label: Stuck Queue Recovery
runbooks.description: Use governor posture, scheduled-job state, and execution-run lineage to identify paused, deferred, or blocked work and restore forward progress safely.

runbooks.label: Sovereign Routing Verification
runbooks.description: Confirm refusal-sensitive or private work stayed on sovereign local lanes and that cloud-safe work remained eligible for frontier supervision.

runbooks.label: Restore Drill
runbooks.description: Verify the ordered recovery posture for Redis, Qdrant, Neo4j, and dashboard/agent deployment state using the governed non-destructive restore rehearsal.

runbooks.label: Incident Review
runbooks.description: Use the operator stream, synthetic operator tests, and release-ladder posture to understand failures, retries, fallback behavior, and recovery decisions.
